script: echo === migration service journal ===; sudo journalctl -u migrate-mskai-claude.service --no-pager 2>&1 | tail -50; echo; echo === migration timer journal ===; sudo journalctl -u migrate-mskai-claude.timer --no-pager 2>&1 | tail -20; echo; echo === script file present? ===; ls -la /usr/local/bin/migrate-mskai-to-claude.sh 2>&1; echo; echo === migration log file? ===; sudo ls -la /var/log/mskai-to-claude-migration.log 2>&1; echo; echo === all transient timers ===; systemctl list-timers --all 2>&1 | head -20
